headline: FICO Invests in the Next Generation of Leaders Through First Tee
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., June 03, 2026--Global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE: FICO) is deepening its commitment to First Tee, a national youth development organization that harnesses the game of golf to instill life skills, build character, and develop confidence.
